title: ds-viz-singlevalue - option matrix (light)
description: Test bench for splunk.singlevalue in light theme. Each panel exercises one option group: unit + unitPosition, underLabel, numberPrecision, trendDisplay (absolute / percent / off), trendColor, sparkline (line / area / off / before / after / below), shouldUseThousandSeparators, shouldAbbreviateTrendValue, custom backgroundColor + majorColor, dynamic colour via DOS / rangeValue. SPL is makeresults-based.

options.query: | makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval revenue = round(8000 + 2000*sin(i/4) + random()%500) | table _time revenue

| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval conversion_rate = round(2.5 + sin(i/4)*0.4 + random()%10/100, 2) | table _time conversion_rate

ds_currency_kpi.name: currency kpi - large value with trend

options.query: | makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval mrr = round(1245000 + i*1500 + random()%2000) | table _time mrr
| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval health = round(85 + sin(i/4)*8 + random()%5) | table _time health
| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval errors = round(12 + sin(i/3)*8 + random()%5) | table _time errors
| makeresults count=48 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-48h") + (i*1800) | eval p95_ms = round(120 + sin(i/6)*30 + random()%20) | table _time p95_ms

options.markdown:
# `splunk.singlevalue` - option matrix (light)

The single most-used Dashboard Studio viz: KPI tiles, headline metrics, ratio numbers. The 10.4 reference exposes 22 options grouped into 4 groups: **value** (`majorValue`, `majorColor`, `majorFontSize`, `numberPrecision`, `unit`, `unitPosition`, `underLabel`, `underLabelFontSize`), **trend** (`trendValue`, `trendDisplay`, `trendColor`, `trendFontSize`, `shouldAbbreviateTrendValue`), **sparkline** (`sparklineValues`, `sparklineDisplay`, `sparklineStrokeColor`, `sparklineAreaColor`, `showSparklineAreaGraph`, `showSparklineTooltip`, `sparklineHighlightDots`, `sparklineHighlightSegments`, `shouldSparklineAcceptNullData`), **chrome** (`backgroundColor`, `shouldUseThousandSeparators`).

viz_basic.title: 1. Minimal - all defaults
viz_basic.description: Reads majorValue from primary search lastPoint(); trendValue defaults to delta(-2); sparkline below; absolute trend.

viz_unit_after.title: 2. unit + unitPosition (after) + underLabel
viz_unit_after.description: unit = '%', unitPosition = 'after' (default), underLabel positions text below major value. Numeric tiles almost always need both.

viz_unit_before.title: 3. unit before + thousand separators + abbreviate trend
viz_unit_before.description: unitPosition = 'before' for currency. shouldUseThousandSeparators = true (default). shouldAbbreviateTrendValue = true rounds the trend to 2 decimals + magnitude unit ('+1.2K').

viz_no_trend.title: 4. Static KPI - trendDisplay off + no sparkline
viz_no_trend.description: Single-row dataSource (no time series). trendDisplay = 'off' suppresses the delta. sparklineDisplay = 'off' removes the chart strip.

viz_dynamic_color_health.title: 5. Dynamic majorColor via rangeValue
viz_dynamic_color_health.description: majorColor uses Dynamic Options Syntax to map the current value to a colour: green >= 90, amber 70-90, red < 70.

viz_dynamic_bg.title: 6. Dynamic backgroundColor - red tile on errors
viz_dynamic_bg.description: Same DOS pattern but applied to backgroundColor. Tile flips red when errors > 15. Use sparingly - whole-tile red is jarring; usually majorColor is enough.

viz_sparkline_area.title: 7. Sparkline as area + tooltip
viz_sparkline_area.description: showSparklineAreaGraph = true fills the sparkline. showSparklineTooltip = true exposes hover values. sparklineAreaColor + sparklineStrokeColor pin both layers.

viz_sparkline_above.title: 8. sparklineDisplay - above (before)
viz_sparkline_above.description: sparklineDisplay = 'before' renders the sparkline above the major value. Useful when the trend is the headline and the number supports it.

viz_sparkline_after.title: 9. sparklineDisplay - after
viz_sparkline_after.description: sparklineDisplay = 'after' renders the sparkline to the right of the major value. Layout choice for wide, short panels (KPI strip).

viz_highlight.title: 10. sparklineHighlightDots + Segments
viz_highlight.description: sparklineHighlightDots = 3 paints the last 3 data points as filled markers. sparklineHighlightSegments = 6 emphasises the most recent 6 segments.

viz_precision_separators.title: 11. numberPrecision + thousand separators OFF
viz_precision_separators.description: numberPrecision = 4 displays 4 decimals. shouldUseThousandSeparators = false strips commas - useful for IDs, version numbers, anything that is not a quantity.

viz_chrome_stripped.title: 12. Chrome-stripped - transparent + custom font sizes
viz_chrome_stripped.description: backgroundColor 'transparent' lets the dashboard background show through. majorFontSize / underLabelFontSize override the dynamic sizing for a fixed visual weight.
